name: Xinjiang Tianye Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Tianye Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical products in China and internationally. It offers various chemical products, such as ethylene glycol, butanediol, PVC resins, PVC paste resins, and caustic soda; and water savings products, including pressure compensating driplines, drip tapes with side flippers, agriculture unplasticized polyvinyl chloride (U-PVC) pipes, and PE hoses modified with nano materials. The company also provides cement products comprising silicate cement clinker, special cement, and general Portland cement products; plastic products, such as U-PVC plastic windows; PVC wood plastic building templates; polyethylene blow molding agricultural mulching films; and unplasticized polyvinyl chloride profiles for door and windows. In addition, it offers tomato paste; and package products, which include heavy packaging films, jumbo bags, and cement bags. Further, the company is involved in calcium carbide, thermoelectricity, mining, building materials, foreign trade, construction, real estate, and other businesses. Xinjiang Tianye Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Shihezi, China.
